name: Circumcision
description: Surgical removal of the foreskin for medical or personal reasons.
preOperativeInstructions: Fast for 6 hours before surgery. Shower on the morning of the procedure.
postOperativeInstructions: Keep the area clean and dry for the first 24 hours, then shower daily. Wear loose-fitting underwear. Avoid sexual activity for at least 4 weeks and avoid strenuous activity until comfortable.
expectedOutcomes: Initial healing within about 2 weeks, with full healing over the following weeks. Improved hygiene and reduced infection risk.

uiCustomization.welcomeBody: Most patients complete initial healing in about 2 weeks, with full healing over the following weeks.

commonConcerns.response: You can shower 24 hours after surgery. Pat the area dry gently.
Mild to moderate swelling for the first week is normal. Use ice packs if needed.
